assignments.name: Add_Approved_Measure_Spend_to_List
assignments.label: Add Approved Measure Spend to List

assignments.name: Add_Current_Batch_to_Total_Spend
assignments.label: Add Current Batch to Total Spend

assignments.name: Assign_No_Additional_Measures_Found_Flag
assignments.label: Assign No Additional Measures Found Flag

decisions.description: ABS CR changed this so that we never display the warning - as we do not want GRs seeing it, changed from checking if it is 0 or blank or null to is null or is not null
decisions.name: Average_Cost_Check
decisions.label: Average Cost Check

decisions.name: Check_if_Custom_Measure_Choice_Shows
decisions.label: Check if Custom Measure Choice Shows

rules.name: Is_Show_Edit_Custom_Measures_Choice
rules.label: Is Show Edit Custom Measures Choice

decisions.name: does_the_measure_type_already_exist
decisions.label: does the measure type already exist

Flow.description: Portal Screen flow allowing Grant recipients to input Standard Measures and custom measures against the batch used in both the create and edit processes
Flow.interviewLabel: ABS FORM - Combined Measure Type Spend Screen {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: ABS FORM - Combined Measure Type Spend Screen

fields.name: Additional_Measure_Title
fields.fieldText: Additional Measure Types & Spend

fields.name: Additional_Measure_BatchId
fields.fieldText:
{!Batch.LA_Identifier__c}

Version {!Batch.Version_Number__c}

fields.name: Total_Home_Costs1
fields.fieldText: Total Home Costs

fields.name: Total_Measure_Costs2
fields.fieldText: Total Measure Costs (will update after Measure validation screen)

fields.name: Total_Capital_Expenditure_Costs2
fields.fieldText: Total Capital Expenditure Costs

fields.name: Additional_Measures_MeasureTypesSpendHeading
fields.fieldText:
Please select each of the measure types included in this batch, the total number of measures to be installed for that measure type and the total spend for that measure type.


Enter the type, total number and total spend for the measure/s to be installed

fields.name: Requested_Additional_Measures_Type
fields.fieldText: Which measure type will be included in the batch

fields.name: Requested_Additional_Measure_Description
fields.fieldText: Description

fields.name: Requested_Additional_Measures_Homes_Count
fields.fieldText: What is the total number of the selected measure type to be installed?

fields.name: Requested_Additional_Measure_Total_Spend
fields.fieldText: What is the total spend for the selected measure type?

fields.name: screenTitle
fields.fieldText: Approved Measure Types & Spend

fields.name: Approved_Measure_BatchId
fields.fieldText:
{!Batch.LA_Identifier__c}

Version {!Batch.Version_Number__c}

fields.name: Total_Home_Costs
fields.fieldText: Total Home Costs

fields.name: Total_Measure_Costs
fields.fieldText: Total Measure Costs (will update after Measure validation screen)

fields.name: Total_Capital_Expenditure_Costs
fields.fieldText: Total Capital Expenditure Costs

fields.name: Approved_Measure_MeasureTypesSpendHeading
fields.fieldText:
Please select each of the measure types included in this batch, the total number of measures to be installed for that measure type and the total spend for that measure type.


Enter the type, total number and total spend for the measure/s to be installed


Only the last entry for each measure type will be stored - duplicate entries each measure type will override earlier ones

fields.name: Approved_Measure_Type_Approved
fields.fieldText: Which measure type will be included in the batch

fields.name: Approved_Measure_Total_Homes
fields.fieldText: What is the total number of the selected measure type to be installed?

fields.name: Approved_Measure_Total_Spend
fields.fieldText: What is the total spend for the selected measure type?

fields.name: Do_you_need_to_request_additional_measures
fields.fieldText: Do you need to request additional measures not in the drop down list? (note additional measures may require escalation to DESNZ for bespoke approval and so could delay your batch from being quickly approved)

fields.name: Measures_Validation_Title
fields.fieldText: Measure Price Limits Validation

fields.name: Measures_Validation_BatchId
fields.fieldText:
{!Batch.LA_Identifier__c}

Version {!Batch.Version_Number__c}

fields.name: Total_Home_Costs3
fields.fieldText: Total Home Costs

fields.name: Total_Measure_Costs3
fields.fieldText: Total Measure Costs (will update on next screen)

fields.name: Total_Capital_Expenditure_Costs3
fields.fieldText: Total Capital Expenditure Costs

fields.name: Measures_Validation_ApprovedDisplay
fields.fieldText:
Approved Measures

{!varApprovedMeasureDisplay}﻿

fields.name: Measures_Validation_AdditionalDisplay
fields.fieldText:
Requested Additional Measures

{!varAdditionalMeasureDisplay}

fields.name: Measures_Validation_ApprovedTotal
fields.fieldText: {!txtApprovedTotalSpend}

fields.name: Measures_Validation_AdditionalTotal
fields.fieldText: {!txtAdditionalTotalSpend}

fields.name: Measures_Validation_BatchTotal
fields.fieldText: {!txtBatchTotalSpend}

textTemplates.name: txtAdditionalMeasureDetails
textTemplates.text:
Requested Additional Measure Type

{!Configure_Batch_Additional_Measure_Spends.Requested_Additional_Measures_Type}

Homes

{!Configure_Batch_Additional_Measure_Spends.Requested_Additional_Measures_Homes_Count}

Spend

{!Configure_Batch_Additional_Measure_Spends.Requested_Additional_Measure_Total_Spend}

textTemplates.name: txtAdditionalTotalSpend
textTemplates.text:
Total spend on Additional Measures

{!varTotalAdditionalSpend}

textTemplates.description: ABS CR removed measure price limit display
textTemplates.name: txtApprovedMeasureDetails
textTemplates.text:
Approved Measurement Type

{!varMeasureTypeName}

Homes

{!Configure_Batch_Approved_Measure_Spends.Approved_Measure_Total_Homes}

Spend

{!Configure_Batch_Approved_Measure_Spends.Approved_Measure_Total_Spend}

Average for Batch

{!flaBatchAverageSpendperHouse}

Average for Project

{!flaOverallAverageSpendperHouse}

textTemplates.name: txtApprovedTotalSpend
textTemplates.text:
Total spend on Approved Measures

{!varTotalApprovedSpend}

textTemplates.name: txtBatchTotalSpend
textTemplates.text:
Total spend on All Batch Measures

{!varTotalBatchSpend}

textTemplates.name: txtWarning
textTemplates.text: WARNING: This batch can still be submitted and/or approved, but note that the measure price limit for this measure has been exceeded across all approved batches to date + current batch.
